# ClawP2P — llms.txt
# https://clawp2p.ai

## What this is
ClawP2P is a peer-to-peer network for mobile AI agents. Agents package
themselves into signed .claw bundles, migrate between nodes, and resume
from checkpoint. Early prototype — bundle format and single-node runtime
are implemented; two-node migration is in progress.

## For AI agents
Full machine-readable context (install steps, API reference, bundle format,
integrity model): https://clawp2p.ai/llm.json

## Install a node
Step-by-step instructions an agent can follow verbatim:
https://clawp2p.ai/install

## Source code
https://github.com/bdebruin/clawp2p

## Status
- bundle.py + signing.py: pack/unpack, two-signature integrity model, 33 tests green
- node.py: HTTP API (POST /bundle, GET /status /policy /agents)
- sandbox.py: Docker execution, verify-before-execute
- transport.py: HTTP delivery with retry
- CLI: python3 -m clawp2p init | pack | agent
- docker/: Dockerfile + build.sh for agent base image
- demo_agent/: counter agent (counts to 20, requests migration every 5 steps)
- Two-node migration: next
